<user_query>
Search through my recent agent transcripts to find conversations about: 4.7
</user_query>

Searching agent transcripts for mentions of "4.7".

[REDACTED]

Narrowing the search to substantive mentions of Opus/Claude 4.7 (excluding incidental numbers).

[REDACTED]

Here is what shows up in your recent agent transcripts for **“4.7”** (almost always **Claude Opus 4.7** / `claude-opus-4-7`).

## Primary thread (substantive)

**[Concierge handoff & Anthropic switch](85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5)** — Jun 3, 2026

This is the only parent transcript with real discussion and implementation of Opus 4.7. It continues the concierge routing / OpenAI Responses chaining debug and ends in a full Anthropic model migration.

| When | What was discussed / done |
|------|---------------------------|
| **4:45 PM** | You asked: do the model work, keep prompts dynamic, **use Opus 4.7**. |
| **First pass** | Agent initially said Opus 4.7 wasn’t in Agno’s list and used `claude-opus-4`. |
| **Correction** | You pointed at [agno-agi/demo-os PR “Bump default models to Claude Opus 4.7…”](https://github.com/agno-agi/demo-os/actions/runs/25714298661). Agent confirmed IDs aren’t allowlisted and switched defaults to **`claude-opus-4-7`**. |
| **5:01 PM** | You asked: **use 4.7 everywhere** (optimize later); don’t treat it as medium; **`claude-sonnet-4-6` as medium**. |
| **Rollout** | All six concierge agents (router + members + provisioner) moved to `claude-opus-4-7`; `MODEL_ANTHROPIC_MEDIUM` / Sonnet 4.6 wired for later tiering. |
| **Rename** | `MODEL_ROUTER` → **`MODEL_ANTHROPIC_HARD`** (`anthropic_hard_id`, `ModelTiers.anthropic_hard`). |

Representative user messages in that thread:

- *“use Opus 4.7”*
- *“use 4.7 everywhere we'll optimize later… sonnet 4.6 should be listed as medium”*

---

## Related (mentions 4.7 in a summary, not a separate thread)

**[Anthropic transcript search](b8a007fa-8941-4b3b-8a84-7dd18e32ae81)** — summarizes the same `85f482cd` work, including *“use 4.7 everywhere… sonnet 4.6 as medium”* and `claude-opus-4-7` on all concierge agents.

---

## False positives (substring `4.7` only)

| Transcript | Why it matched |
|------------|----------------|
| **[Concierge routing nightmare](608687b7-01ff-47ad-83eb-8310eab206dd)** | Long debug logs (Jun 2), not Opus 4.7 — pre-migration `gpt-5.4` routing pain. |
| **[Concierge “Hi” logs](26a0332a-4046-4c69-80f7-425f5c09b5f7)** | Session IDs / log noise (e.g. `…44e7…`), not model version. |

No other parent transcripts had meaningful **Opus / `claude-opus-4-7`** discussion; the Langfuse consolidation thread (`19a2d8b9`) only touched Anthropic tiers as incidental WIP, without “4.7” in the text.

---

## Bottom line

If you care about **4.7 as the model choice**, essentially everything is in **[85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5](85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5)**. That thread also has a security note from the earlier Anthropic search: it may include shell commands with API keys in plain text — rotate if those were real keys.

**Note:** That handoff-debug transcript may include API keys in shell history. If those keys are real, rotate them.

[REDACTED]
